sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23880" key="deka/skalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκά-σκαλμος</orth> <sense id="n23880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ναῦς</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with ten banks of oars,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
